title: Mizoram PSC – Junior Grade of MSS – 11 Posts

basic_details.job_title: Mizoram PSC Junior Grade of MSS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 11 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC) has released 11 Junior Grade of MSS vacancies. Eligible candidates with not less than 5 years regular service in the grade of Assistant can apply online from 22 April 2026 to 25 May 2026 at mpsc.mizoram.gov.in.

qualification.education_qualification: Not less than 5 years regular service in the grade of Assistant.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Mizoram PSC Junior Grade of MSS Recruitment 2026.
